task_completion.description: Verify that the document has been divided into three distinct sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual indicators of section breaks (e.g., non-printing characters showing 'Section Break' or page layout changes) separating the Title Page, the Table of Contents, and section '2.5.1 Product Development Rationale'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Section 1 (Title Page) has no header or page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the first page (ending at 'January 2025'). The header and footer margins must be completely empty with no text or page numbers.

task_completion.description: Verify that Section 2 has the correct header text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the page starting with 'Table of Contents'. The top header margin must contain the text 'Sorvimab — NDA 215847 — Clinical Overview'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Section 2 has centered lowercase Roman numeral page numbers starting at i.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom footer margin of the 'Table of Contents' page. It must contain a centered lowercase Roman numeral 'i'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Section 3 has the correct header text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the page starting with '2.5.1 Product Development Rationale'. The top header margin must contain the text 'Sorvimab — NDA 215847 — Clinical Overview'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Section 3 has centered Arabic numeral page numbers starting at 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom footer margin of the page starting with '2.5.1 Product Development Rationale'. It must contain a centered Arabic numeral '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document was saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the word processor's title bar or a file explorer window to confirm the active document is named 'clinical_overview_formatted.docx'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a word processing application (like LibreOffice Writer) being actively used, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts executing the changes.

integrity.description: Verify that headers and footers are placed in the actual margin fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The header and footer text/numbers should appear in the designated header/footer areas of the document UI (often separated by a line or distinct margin space), not just typed as regular body text at the top or bottom of the page.

integrity.description: Verify that the original document content was not deleted or replaced.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actual text of the clinical overview (e.g., 'Product Development Rationale', 'Table of Contents') must be visible in the document body.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/clinical_overview_formatted.docx. It must contain exactly 3 sections. The header text for Sections 2 and 3 must be exactly 'Sorvimab — NDA 215847 — Clinical Overview'. Section 2 (starting at TOC) must use centered lowercase Roman numerals starting at 'i'. Section 3 (starting at 2.5.1) must use centered Arabic numerals starting at '1'. The document is approximately 5-6 pages long.
